mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.apply_id AS applyId, l.change_type AS type, a.subject AS title, l.old_start_time AS oldStartTime, l.new_start_time AS newStartTime, l.reason, l.create_by AS operator, l.create_time AS time FROM eh_change_log l LEFT JOIN eh_apply a ON a.id = l.apply_id AND a.del_flag = '0' WHERE l.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
